title_en: From Adopted to Designing — Three-Layer Convergence Lifts Cardano Into Its Self-Sufficient Phase
title_ja: 「採用される側」から「設計する側」へ — 三層融合で自立フェーズに離陸した週
executive_summary_en: W17 will be recorded as the week Cardano moved from "the L1 that gets adopted" to "the L1 that designs what gets adopted next." Three layers converged: (1) Autonomy — IOG published 9 Treasury proposals for 2026 totaling under 50% of last year's budget, anchoring Strategy 2030 (Leios testnet June, Plutus V5, van Rossem HF May 28 GA) on its own balance sheet. (2) Adoption bridge — VIA Labs USDM × Midnight integration, Midnames mainnet, Eclipse 4-week bounty, Zealy partner sprint, Midnight Node 1.0.0 RC, and Explorer v2.0.0 fired in the same week. (3) Institutional tailwind — BTC ETFs flipped to positive April monthly inflow, Senator Moreno publicly committed to passing CLARITY by end of May (+8pt prediction-market move), and Japan's FSA published final guidelines on Apr 23. Markets carried a renewed Hormuz premium (WTI +14.88%, Brent +10.40%) yet VIX fell to 18.71 (-8.20% W-o-W) — geopolitics processed as standing cost, not event. Underneath sit three SITION doctrines: Trinity (AI agents × trust × privacy), Architecture Paradigm Shift (post-Kelp DAO $293M hack), and EUTXO × EVM Divergence. W17 is the first week Cardano detached from external-capital dependence and stood up as the chain that designs the next standard.
executive_summary_ja: W17 は、Cardano が「採用される側」から「設計する側」へ移行した週として記録される。三層融合で自立フェーズへ離陸した。第一層は自立 ── IOG が 4/22-25 に公開した 2026 年トレジャリー提案 9 件は前年比 50% 未満の規模に絞り込まれ、Leios テストネット 6 月・Plutus V5・van Rossem HF (5/28 GA 予定) という Strategy 2030 を「自前の財布で歩く」宣言となった。第二層は採用ブリッジ ── 4/24 に VIA Labs が USDM × Midnight 統合を発表し、Midnames mainnet・Eclipse バウンティ・Zealy スプリント・Midnight Node 1.0.0 RC・Explorer v2.0.0 が同週同時着火。第三層は制度後押し ── BTC ETF が 4 月月次フローでプラス転換し、Senator Moreno は CLARITY Act の「5 月末成立」を確言、日本では FSA が 4/23 に最終ガイドラインを公表。Hormuz プレミアム再燃 (WTI +14.88%・Brent +10.40%) も VIX は 18.71 (-8.20% W-o-W) で慢性化処理。背景には Trinity Doctrine、Architecture Paradigm Shift、EUTXO × EVM 乖離の三ドクトリンがある。自立 × 採用ブリッジ × 制度後押しが同週に揃った W17 は、Cardano が外部資本依存から離陸し、自ら次の標準を設計する側に立った最初の週である。

four_panel_summary.governance: Intersect 2026 budget DRep vote opened Apr 22 with 3,004 attendees at the AMA. 9 Treasury proposals, total under 50% of last year. Leios 27.7M ADA, van Rossem HF GA targeted May 28. Singapore Summit vote live through May 10. SIPO DRep #11 / 1,010. US: Moreno commits to CLARITY by end of May (+8pt prediction market). JP: FSA final guidelines (Apr 23) lock financial-instrument classification.
four_panel_summary.governance_ja: Intersect 2026予算DRep投票が4/22起動・AMA 3,004名参加。9提案・前年比50%未満。Leios 27.7M ADA・van Rossem HF GA 5/28予定。Singapore Summit 投票5/10まで継続中。SIPO DRep #11 / 1,010。米: Moreno「CLARITY 5月末成立」確言（予測市場+8pt）。日: FSA最終ガイドライン（4/23）で「金融商品」化確定。
four_panel_summary.defi: Cardano TVL ~$145M (+2.1% W-o-W). VESPR v4 announces Bitcoin support; Pulse DEX brings AMM+Orderbook hybrid to EUTxO; Chainlink reaches AWS Marketplace. jpg.store closes after 5 years — transition signal toward DeFi Kernel + Midnight ZKP NFT primitives. Stake share 21.80B ADA, ~59% active.
four_panel_summary.defi_ja: Cardano TVL 約$145M（W-o-W +2.1%）。VESPR v4 Bitcoin対応予告・Pulse DEX AMM+Orderbookハイブリッド・Chainlink AWS Marketplace登場。jpg.store閉鎖は次世代NFTインフラ移行の合図。Stake 21.80B ADA・active 約59%。
four_panel_summary.midnight: VIA Labs USDM × Midnight integration (Apr 24) — first privacy-enabled stablecoin settlement path on Cardano. Midnames mainnet, Eclipse 4-week bounty, Zealy partner sprint same day. Midnight Node 1.0.0 RC (Apr 25). Explorer v2.0.0 (Apr 23). NIGHT -2.27% W-o-W is a lagging indicator; structural buildout accelerating.
four_panel_summary.midnight_ja: VIA Labs USDM × Midnight統合（4/24）— Cardano初のプライバシー付きステーブル決済路。Midnames mainnet・Eclipseバウンティ・Zealyスプリント同日着火。Midnight Node 1.0.0 RC（4/25）・Explorer v2.0.0（4/23）。NIGHT -2.27%は遅行指標、構造構築は加速。
four_panel_summary.risk: Overall MEDIUM (↘ improving). Hormuz premium re-ignited (WTI +14.88%, Brent +10.40%) but VIX 18.71 (-8.20% W-o-W) signals chronic-vol absorption. BTC ETF April monthly flipped positive. FOMC (est. Apr 29-30) is next week's largest event. Architecture LOW: post-Kelp-DAO $293M hack, Cardano UTxO + Partner Chain (Midnight ZK / Hydra / Minotaur) advantage visible at implementation layer.
four_panel_summary.risk_ja: 総合MEDIUM（↘改善傾向）。Hormuzプレミアム再燃（WTI +14.88%・Brent +10.40%）もVIX 18.71（-8.20% W-o-W）で慢性化処理。BTC ETF 4月月次プラス転換。FOMC（来週4/29-30想定）が最大イベント。Architecture LOW: Kelp DAO $293Mハック後、Cardano UTxO + Partner Chain（Midnight ZK / Hydra / Minotaur）の構造優位が実装層で顕在化。
